color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
图例
蓝色=Foundry 本地编排/证据
紫色=CLI / deterministic primitive
绿色=Codex 语义研制
青色=数据库 / search index / remote IO
黄色=门禁判断

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
用户短指令
导入 / 写入外部 LCA 数据包

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Foundry router
加载 profile、constraints、account context
创建/恢复 workspace 与 checkpoint ledger

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
输入是否已经结构化
TIDAS / ILCD rows?

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Codex source-evidence authoring
从 PDF、网页、报告、截图、表格抽取事实
产出 draft TIDAS rows + citations

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Foundry artifact
source manifest、checksum、source label、version、unpack dir

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CLI / tool
tidas-tools import-lca
产出 normalized rows、ILCD、mapping.csv、conversion report

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CLI QA
tiangong-lca dataset validate
exchange direction、source trace、mapping completeness

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CLI queue build
tiangong-lca dataset curation-queue build
输入 support、flow、process、external-flow-ref rows

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CLI dispatcher
curation-queue next --entity-type support|flow|process
返回 action_manifest、executor、input/output artifacts

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CLI action
按返回命令原样执行
extract / apply / validate / lookup / preflight / refresh / schema-review

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Codex semantic action
只处理 CLI 明确交给 Codex 的语义内容
name split、classification decision、candidate choice、translation draft、evidence-backed fields

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Codex outputs
draft JSONL + *.provenance.json
必须匹配 action_id、input hash、artifact_lineage

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CLI validate/apply gate
name-plan validate/apply
bilingual apply/validate
schema/review/name-quality gates

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Entity checkpoint
记录 inputs/outputs hashes、commands/skills、gate status、blockers

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
4 Support loop
CLI: next support、name-plan/bilingual extract-apply-validate、support validation/catalog
Codex: source/contact/unitgroup/flowproperty 名称、标题、翻译、证据选择
DB/index: 优先复用 public/canonical support refs

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
5 Flow loop
CLI: next flow、UUID/version lookup、identity-preflight、build-plan、name-quality、schema/review
Codex: 候选复用判断、分类、四段式 name、双语转译、provenance reason
DB/index: exact lookup、hybrid/search candidates、public/account flow visibility

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Authority catalog
finalized support rows + finalized owned flows + public/external flow refs
process 后续只能消费这个 catalog

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
6 Process closure loop
CLI: next process、references refresh-remote、materialize refs、complete-required-fields、identity-preflight、schema/review
Codex: exchange evidence repair、reference year、annual supply、prose translation、waiver reasoning
DB/index: remote refs、visible support/flow rows、readback inputs

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
数据库 / index 能力
UUID/version exact lookup
full-text / hybrid / embedding search
public 与 account 可见性
remote reference resolution
remote write + readback diff

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Foundry mapping/report
合并 conversion mapping、curation deltas、bilingual evidence、reference rewrites、publish/readback reports

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CLI final-answer guard
tiangong-lca dataset curation-queue guard --json

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CLI prewrite evidence gate
tiangong-lca dataset curation-queue verify
校验所有 owned entity 的 name-plan / bilingual / lineage artifacts

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CLI remote write
official paths only
publish-support、publish run、flow/process publish
dry-run first，guarded commit

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CLI + DB readback verify
dataset verify-remote / current-account review
root rows + referenced rows resolve remotely
diff final rows and accepted mapping differences

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Done
checkpoints passed/waived
write reports + readback reports + follow-ups preserved

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stop and preserve blocker
missing profile/account/source、conversion blocker、next blocked、manual_review、gate blocker、remote partial failure

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Closed-loop regression
若是 CLI / SDK / tidas-tools / skill / profile 缺陷
修 owning repo，rebuild local tool，fresh downstream run
